## Task
Build a simple task manager where users can add, complete, and delete tasks — deploy it fully.

## Frontend
Deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.

## Backend
Deployed to Render.

## Run Locally
```bash
# Backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn main:app --reload

# Frontend
npm install && npm run dev
```
